$comment: Reference case for wet_darkening (darkenedAlbedo = albedo * (1 - wetness * darkFactor)). One coefficient (darkFactor); two inputs (albedo, wetness). Product-sweep covers the full [0,1] × [0,1] domain — the material tier's representative fit. Fills out the 'material' category of the reference set.
notes: 110-point grid (10 × 11) covers the full valid input domain. Output range is [0.05, 1.0]; rmse_max=0.005 is tight against that span. darkFactor enters linearly inside the bracket so the fit is well-conditioned; 2 % relative_tolerance catches any drift in the multiplicative coefficient path.
